name: Mother's Poinsettias (Christmas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. NOTE--Cookie dough must pass easily through a cookie press. It may be necessary to add from 1/4 to 1/2 cup more flour to adjust consistency.
3. Cream all ingredients together in a mixer except flour.
4. Add flour by hand and mix until well combined.
To Make Poinsettias:
5. Reserve 1/2 cup dough to color green for leaves.
6. Using red vegetable coloring, color the dough to the desired shade. Use a sunburst plate of the cookie press for the flower.
7. Using green vegetable coloring, color the dough to the desired shade. Take a pinch of dough in your palm and roll it with the finger of your other hand until it is tapered. Lay on an ungreased sheet.
8. Dip a fork in sugar and flatten the green dough to make leaves. Space four leaves per row, making three rows of leaves. Color all the leaves first.
9. With the press filled with red dough, drop out the red flower at the bottom of each leaf.
10. Use a toothpick to indent the center of the flower and place silver sprinkles in the center.
11. Bake for 10 minutes at 325°F. Cool on racks.
12. Store in a tin box between layers of wax paper.
